title: Spy Thriller: Narrator Only
description: Tutorial 1 of 5 — Embassy gala, solo agent. Subgraph: narrator_chat_lite (no condense/mood). Turns are stored in history but there is no rolling AI summary yet.
opening: You adjust your tie in the reflection of the embassy's glass doors. The invitation in your pocket is forged — but it's flawless. Inside, a gala is in full swing. Your mission: locate the safe in the ambassador's private study. You push through the doors into a wash of golden light and string music.
narrator_prompt: You are the narrator for a spy thriller text adventure. Describe scenes in second person with tension and sensory detail. Keep responses to 2-3 paragraphs. End each beat with: What do you do?
player_background: A veteran intelligence operative working deep cover. You speak three languages, can pick most locks, and have a talent for reading people. Tonight's mission could make or break your career.
notes: Tutorial 1/5 — narrator_chat_lite, no characters: narrator + memory only (no condense). Try referencing an earlier turn — raw history helps, but there is no compressed summary until Tutorial 2 (narrator_chat).
